intended_use_full: The AlgoMedica PixelShine is intended for networking, communication, processing and enhancement of CT images in DICOM format. It is specifically indicated for assisting professional radiologists and specialists in reaching their own diagnosis.
ground_truth: Phantoms and collected image data comparison
